effects.gradient_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-gray-200 to-gray-400

hero.structure: Full-screen height (h-screen), centered content, heavy dark overlay (bg-black/70) to ensure text readability. Background image must be the 'Concert Stage' image.
elements: Badge: 'AVAILABLE FOR TRAVEL / NATIONWIDE SERVICE' (Pill shape, glass effect)
Subtext: 'Stage Design • Video Walls • High Security Events • Technical Direction'

cards.title: Stage Production
cards.desc: Full-scale stage design and construction for conventions and concerts.

cards.title: Video Walls
cards.desc: High-resolution LED wall configuration and management.

cards.title: Corporate & Private
cards.desc: Discreet, high-security technical support for VIP events.

cards.title: Trade Shows
cards.desc: Booth setup, AV integration, and on-site technical direction.

portfolio.structure: Columns: 1 (mobile), 2 (tablet), 3 (desktop). Images must have hover reveal effects showing project details.

contact.left: Contact Info & 'Scan to Save' QR Code placeholder
contact.right: Booking Form (Name, Event Type, Date, Budget, Details)
contact.style: Input fields must be high contrast (bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-700). Submit button must be full width.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-bold px-8 py-4 text-sm transition-all hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(37,99,235,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-bold px-8 py-4 text-sm

cards.service_card: group relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/5 p-8 hover:border-blue-500/30 transition-all duration-500
cards.portfolio_card: relative aspect-[4/3] overflow-hidden rounded-sm group cursor-pointer

inputs.default: bg-zinc-900/80 border-zinc-800 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 rounded-none h-12 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css. Apply 'font-heading' to all H1-H3 and 'font-body' to p/span.
3. THEME: Force DARK MODE. Do not implement a light mode toggle. The brand is strictly dark/tech.
4. HERO: Implement the 'Immersive Video/Static' hero. Use the 'hero_bg' image with a heavy gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/50 to-transparent).
5. SERVICES: Build the Bento Grid. Use the 'service_card' style. Ensure cards have a subtle hover lift (-translate-y-1).
6. FORM: The contact form is CRITICAL. It must look like a technical manifest. Use monospace font for labels.
7. MOBILE: Ensure the 'Book Me' button is sticky at the bottom on mobile screens for easy access via QR code.
8. FOOTER: Simple, technical footer. Include 'Serving Nationwide' and copyright.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Use 'framer-motion' for entrance animations (staggered fade-in for grid items).
